plan_name: Foundation: workspace deps, AppState, ApiError, and new store query functions

tasks.name: Task 1: Add workspace dependencies and create AppState + ApiError modules
tasks.notes: axum 0.8, tower-http 0.6, tokio-util 0.7, uuid 1 added as workspace deps. AppState with conn/version/db_path and SharedState = Arc<AppState> created. ApiError with NotFound/BadRequest/Internal implementing IntoResponse created. From<tokio_rusqlite::Error> and From<rusqlite::Error> conversions implemented.

tasks.name: Task 2: Implement 7 new store query functions for API endpoints
tasks.notes: 7 new public functions added: get_session, session_conversation, session_tree, session_agents, session_summary, get_message, token_stats_by_day. 6 new result structs: SessionDetail, ConversationMessage, TreeNode, AgentEntry, SessionSummaryStats. ExportMessage and TokenStats reused for get_message and token_stats_by_day respectively. All 26 existing tests pass.

decisions: rusqlite accessed via tokio_rusqlite::rusqlite re-export in server crate (per decision [02-03]), avoiding direct rusqlite dependency
tokio_rusqlite::Error variant is Error(E) not Rusqlite -- plan pseudocode adjusted
tokio_rusqlite::Error is #[non_exhaustive], requiring wildcard catch-all arm in match

deviations.description: tokio_rusqlite 0.7.0 Error enum has variant Error(E), not Rusqlite(E) as assumed in the plan. Also the enum is #[non_exhaustive] requiring a wildcard arm. Fixed during implementation.
